title: Mizoram PSC Tourist Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) Tourist Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 22 April 2026 on the official website https://mpsc.mizoram.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Mizoram PSC Tourist Officer Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Tourist Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) Tourist Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 22 April 2026 on the official website https://mpsc.mizoram.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Mizoram PSC Tourist Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years in case of ST/SC candidates or as may be notified by the Government from time to time.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree in Hospitality, Hotel, Travel & Tourism Management/Administration OR Graduate with Diploma
qualification.details: Bachelor’s degree or above in Hospitality, Hotel, Travel & Tourism Management/Administration from a recognized University. OR Graduate with a Diploma or above in Hospitality, Hotel, Travel & Tourism Management/Administration from a recognized University/Institution. Computer Proficiency as prescribed by the Mizoram Group ‘A’, ‘B’ and ‘C’ posts Service/Recruitment (Amendment) Rules, 2023. Mizo Language Proficiency: A candidate must achieve the pass mark in the qualifying test or be exempted if they studied Mizo in Class-X (HSLC) or above within Mizoram or opted as MIL outside Mizoram.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mizoram PSC Tourist Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mizoram PSC Tourist Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Mizoram PSC Tourist Officer position is 29th May 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Tourist Officer post is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years as of 01-01-2026. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Tourist Officer role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor’s degree or above in Hospitality, Hotel, Travel & Tourism Management/Administration, or a Graduate with a Diploma or above in the same fields from a recognized institution. Computer and Mizo language proficiency are also mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Tourist Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Tourist Officer as per the official notification released by the Mizoram Public Service Commission.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Tourist Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Tourist Officer post will be placed at Level – 9 in the Pay Matrix, which offers a competitive salary as per government norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the Mizoram PSC Tourist Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the notification, there is no application fee mentioned for the PwBD category. For other categories, please refer to the official notification for detailed information.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Tourist Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Mizoram PSC Tourist Officer recruitment will be based on a Direct Recruitment Examination. Candidates need to perform well in this examination to be considered for the post.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, the upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years in case of ST/SC candidates. Further relaxations may be provided as per government rules and regulations.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the Mizoram PSC Tourist Officer job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of Mizoram PSC or via the direct application link provided in the Important Links section before the last date, 29th May 2026.
